sulfate_s_pct.description: Soufre sulfate (%). Optionnel — si absent et total_s_pct fourni, calculé comme total_s_pct - sulfide_s_pct (plancher 0).
sulfate_s_pct.title: Sulfate S Pct

sulfide_s_pct.description: Soufre sulfure (%) — base du potentiel acide Sobek-style
sulfide_s_pct.title: Sulfide S Pct

total_s_pct.description: Soufre total (%). Optionnel — si absent, calculé comme sulfide_s_pct + sulfate_s_pct (ou sulfide_s_pct seul si sulfate absent).
total_s_pct.title: Total S Pct

updates.description: Liste de critères à mettre à jour (minimum 1)
updates.title: Updates

name.description: Nom unique du template de circuit
name.title: Name

CloneTemplateIn.title: CloneTemplateIn

source_id.description: UUID of flowsheet or scenario_flowsheet; null = use project's active flowsheet
source_id.title: Source Id

cached.description: True if this compilation was already in DB (dedup hit)
cached.title: Cached

ConsequenceInputsIn.title: ConsequenceInputsIn

id.description: UUID du critère à mettre à jour
id.title: Id

name.description: Name for the new scenario; auto-generated if omitted

template_name.description: One of the in-code custom templates
template_name.title: Template Name

CustomScenarioResponse.description: Shared response for all custom-scenario creation endpoints.
CustomScenarioResponse.title: CustomScenarioResponse

DesignBasisCreateIn.title: DesignBasisCreateIn

components.description: Blocs : mass_balance_streams, simulation_params, equipment_energy_tags, recent_simulation_runs, lims_test_chain (densité a1+b1).
components.title: Components

weights.description: Poids des composantes (somme = 1). Clés alignées sur `components`.

weights_version.description: Même principe que readiness — traçabilité des barèmes.
weights_version.title: Weights Version

missing_gate_ids.description: Liste des `id` de gates pour lesquelles `ok` est faux.
missing_gate_ids.title: Missing Gate Ids

possible.description: Somme des poids des gates présentes (typiquement 100).
possible.title: Possible

weights_version.description: Version serveur des pondérations et barèmes ; utile pour comparer les séries dans le temps.
weights_version.title: Weights Version

EquipmentIn.description: Manual equipment add. is_overridden is forced to true server-side.
EquipmentIn.title: EquipmentIn

wbs_code.description: Code WBS (doit exister dans la table wbs_codes)
wbs_code.title: Wbs Code

version.description: Version actuelle pour le verrouillage optimiste
version.title: Version

FeedOverride.description: Feed stream override for section simulation.
FeedOverride.title: FeedOverride

FidelityComponentBlockOut.description: Sous-score d’une composante ; champs supplémentaires selon le bloc (raw, items, …).
FidelityComponentBlockOut.title: FidelityComponentBlockOut

FlowsheetNodePatch.description: Body for PATCH /operations/{oid}. All fields optional.
FlowsheetNodePatch.title: FlowsheetNodePatch

FundingAnalyzeRequest.description: Request body for single funding scenario analysis.
FundingAnalyzeRequest.title: FundingAnalyzeRequest

op_code.description: Code de l'opération unitaire (doit exister dans le catalogue)
op_code.title: Op Code

availability_pct.description: Disponibilité équipement / calendrier (%) pour dimensionnement et OPEX.
availability_pct.title: Availability Pct

gold_grade_g_t.description: Teneur en or totale du minerai (g/t Au), tête de traitement.
gold_grade_g_t.title: Gold Grade G T

operating_hours_day.description: Heures d'opération nominale / jour (24 h = continu). Utilisé pour extrapoler t/h → t/j.
operating_hours_day.title: Operating Hours Day

detail.description: Compteurs et cibles (critères DC, sections MB, LIMS 90 j, etc.).
detail.title: Detail

fraction.description: Crédit partiel 0–1 avant application du poids.
fraction.title: Fraction

id.description: Identifiant stable de la gate (ex. circuit_criteria, lims).
id.title: Id

ok.description: True si fraction ≥ 0,95 (gate considérée comme satisfaite).
ok.title: Ok

weight.description: Poids de la gate ; la somme des poids vaut 100.
weight.title: Weight

role.description: One of: Process Engineer, Metallurgist, Project Manager, Cost Engineer, Reviewer, Read-only
role.title: Role

post.description:
One-shot migration: add missing columns to lims_m1.
Safe to call multiple times (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS).
Remove this endpoint after the fix is confirmed.

get.description: List all users (id, email, role, full_name, created_at). No password hashes.

post.description: Create a new user. Password is hashed with pgcrypto bcrypt.

delete.description: Delete a user. Cannot delete yourself.

get.description: Get a single user by id.

patch.description: Update user fields (email, full_name, role). Does not change password.

get.description: Return current authenticated user info.

post.description:
Project-Manager-only registration. Creates a new user with 'Metallurgist'
role by default. Public self-signup is disabled — accounts must be
provisioned by an authenticated Project Manager.

get.description: Return the equipment catalog grouped by category.

Expected CSV format:

    2026-01-01T08:00:00Z, 620.5, ...

get.description: Return the latest KPI snapshot for the project.
Alias for /kpi — used by HTML frontend.

get.description: Return time-series readings for a tag.

post.description: Send a message to the AI metallurgical assistant.

Verify the integrity of the audit event checksum chain for a project.

Iterates all events in chronological order, recomputes each checksum,
and compares against the stored value.

post.description: Auto-generate FAT or SAT checklists from equipment table.
Compute Kp/Ti/Td from tuning method and store in pid_loops.

delete.description: Delete a block model configuration and all its blocks.

get.description: Paginated block retrieval with optional filters. Returns aggregate stats.
Resource sensitivity table at multiple cut-off grades.
Distribution stats: by rock type + grade histogram buckets.

schema.title: Response Get Templates Api V1 Projects  Pid  Capex Templates Get

get.description:
Return emission factors: project-specific overrides + global defaults
for any factor_key not overridden at project level.

post.description: Analyze LIMS data and recommend the optimal process circuit.

get.description: List all circuit templates for project.

post.description: Create a circuit template. Body: {name: str}

delete.description:
Soft-delete template: mark is_active=FALSE to preserve FK integrity
with circuit_compilations that reference this template_id.

get.description: Get template detail with operations and criteria counts.

post.description:
Set this template as the active one for the project.

Deactivates all other templates for the project first, then activates
the requested one. This ensures only one template is active at a time.

Clone a circuit template — copies operations + design criteria — to target project.

The user must have access to both source and target projects.

get.description:
List all enabled criteria for this template, grouped by section.

Prepends standard PDC general sections (General Plant Design Criteria,
General Project Information, Ore Characteristics) from the legacy
design_criteria table before circuit-specific V2 criteria.

post.description: Re-run LIMS enrichment on all criteria for this template.

Recalculate ALL derived design criteria values from primary inputs.

When a user changes a primary input (throughput, grade, recovery, BWi, etc.),
this endpoint propagates the change through the entire calculation chain:
Crushing → Comminution → Flotation → Regrind → Thickener → Leach/CIP →
Reagents → Detox → Tailings → Gold production.

Regenerate criteria for every enabled operation in a template.

This is the project-level repair path when an existing project was created
before the equipment catalog had the richer Excel-style parameter sets.
`force=true` rebuilds each equipment group from the current catalog.

patch.description:
Update a single criterion with optimistic locking.

Body must include "version" and at least one of the allowed fields.

post.description:
Check an operation. Body: {op_code: str}
1. Validate op_code exists in catalog
2. Check dependencies
3. INSERT into circuit_operations
4. Generate default design criteria
5. Return operation + criteria count

delete.description:
Uncheck an operation.
CASCADE POLICY:
1. Check no other enabled operations depend on this one
2. Soft-delete criteria (SET enabled=false)
3. Return removed operation + affected criteria count

post.description:
Re-insert default_criteria from unit_operations_catalog for an existing operation.

Default behaviour (force=false): INSERT only — existing rows preserved
via ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Useful when criteria are missing (seed drift)
or when the catalog has gained new criteria but the user wants to keep
their edits on the existing ones.

With force=true: DELETE all enabled design_criteria_v2 rows for this
template+op_code, then re-insert from the current catalog. Use this
when you want a clean rebuild after the catalog has been updated with
a new sub-section structure (e.g. HPGR went from 12 flat criteria to
32 organised across 6 sub-sections). User customisations are lost.

Propagate circuit operations to flowsheet blocks and equipment.

For each enabled operation in the circuit:
1. Check if a flowsheet block with matching label exists -- if not, add it
2. Check if equipment with matching op_code tag prefix exists -- if not, add basic items

This is a simplified propagation that adds blocks to the existing flowsheet
and basic equipment entries. Full MER generation comes in Phase 3.

Returns: {flowsheet_blocks_added: int, equipment_items_added: int}

Analyze LIMS data and suggest circuit operations.

Metallurgical decision logic based on:
  - BWi / A×b / DWi  → comminution circuit selection (SABC vs HPGR vs AG)
  - S_total / S_sulfide / C_organic → refractory treatment (POX, BIOX, UFG)
  - GRG / gravity recovery → gravity circuit inclusion
  - Flotation recovery → flotation + regrind path
  - Leach recovery / NaCN consumption → CIL vs CIP vs heap leach
  - Thickener unit area → dewatering equipment

Metallurgical coherence check: compare enabled operations against LIMS data.

Returns warnings for operations that lack metallurgical justification,
and missing operations that LIMS data suggests should be included.

get.description: Aggregate total closure provision and break down by phase.
List all compliance data snapshots for a project.
List all compliance workflows for a project.

post.description: Create a new compliance review workflow in draft state.

get.description: Get a single compliance workflow by ID.

post.description: Attach a reviewer comment to a compliance workflow.
Advance workflow state via approve/reject action.
Recalculate OPEX line items from current simulation parameters.

get.description: Get a cost model (CAPEX or OPEX) with all its line items.

post.description: Add a line item to a cost model.
Reset a cost model to defaults (deletes all lines and re-seeds).
Run cascade recalculation for DC changes.

get.description:
Expose the cascade DAG (inputs + computed nodes) for the Living Circuit.

The DAG is loaded from dc_dag_registry.yaml. Project-scoped at the URL
so future per-project enrichment is non-breaking; v1.0 returns the same
payload for any pid the user can access.

post.description: Freeze current DC state as an immutable snapshot.

patch.description:
Update a `design_criteria_v2` row keyed by its UUID, scoped to project `pid`.

Living Circuit edit flow lands here. The row's `template_id` must belong
to a `circuit_template` whose `project_id` is `pid`; otherwise 404.

Replaces the legacy `PATCH /design-criteria/rows/{rid}` for cascade
purposes — the legacy endpoint still exists (and is deprecated) but
writes to the legacy `design_criteria` table that the cascade engine
never reads.

Auth: `require_project_role` combines role-check (engineer-class) with
project-membership-check, so a user who is not a member of `pid` is
rejected before we even reach the JOIN check below.

get.description: Compare two snapshots, or a snapshot vs current draft (target='draft').

post.description: Load or validate a pipeline step.

get.description: Get the current pipeline steps for this project based on circuit flags.

post.description: Set the circuit topology. Three modes: recommended (LIMS-driven), custom, catalog.

get.description: Return the CIL/CIP selection and its metallurgical justification for this project.

patch.description:
DEPRECATED — write-through to legacy `design_criteria`.

The cascade engine reads `design_criteria_v2`, not this table. Use
`PATCH /api/v1/projects/{pid}/dc-pipeline/rows/{rid}` for any new
write paths so the change is observable to `run_cascade` (Chunk 1.5
relocation, audit U1). The legacy endpoint stays for backward
compatibility — legacy report consumers (NI 43-101 export, dashboard,
risks, mass-balance auto-gen) still read the legacy table.

post.description: Compute DCF model synchronously and store in dcf_models table.
Queue Monte Carlo simulation as Celery task.
Compute simple payback period from DCF cashflows.

Tornado chart sensitivity analysis.

Varies each specified parameter ±variation_pct% and computes NPV impact.
Returns sorted results (largest swing first) for tornado chart visualization.

get.description:
Return full MER, optionally filtered by WBS code.

Returns: {items: [...], summary: {total_items, total_kw, total_capex, long_lead_count}}

post.description:
Add a manual equipment item.

Body must include: wbs_code, eq_type, equipment_name.

delete.description: Delete all equipment items for this project (hard delete).

post.description:
Generate full MER from the selected circuit template.

If dry_run=True, return preview without inserting.
Calls generate_mer() from engine.

get.description: Return only long-lead items sorted by lead_time_weeks desc.

Summary grouped by WBS code.

Returns: [{wbs_code, wbs_description, item_count, total_kw, total_capex, long_lead_count}]

Update equipment item fields. Optimistic locking with version.

Allowed fields: equipment_name, quantity, description, comments, specifications,
has_vfd, duty_status, installed_kw, emergency_power, vendor, price_cad,
installation_hours, reference_doc, is_long_lead, lead_time_weeks, weight_kg, material

post.description: Size a single equipment item and store in equipment_sizing table.
Auto-size all major equipment items from simulation parameters.
Assign a vendor catalog entry to an equipment item.

get.description:
Return the project's flowsheet tree + KPIs.

404 if no template exists (front shows empty-state CTA).
422 if template exists but has no root.

post.description:
Idempotent: ensure a circuit_template exists for the project. Return it.
The frontend calls this when the user lands on the editor for the first time.

get.description: Retrieve the latest energy balance by computing it on-the-fly.

post.description: Calculate energy balance for all operations in the active circuit template.

get.description: Retrieve all sizing by computing on-the-fly.

post.description: Calculate equipment sizing for all operations in the active template.

Body: {"template_code": "AU_CIL_OXIDE", "template_name": "Optional name"}.

Creates a fresh circuit_template + cascades all operations from the template.
Returns the created template_id. If the project already has a flowsheet, a
new circuit_template is created (the existing one is not deleted — the user
can keep it as history).

Add a node to the project's flowsheet tree.

- parent_op_id=None creates the root. A second root is rejected (400).
- parent_op_id must reference a node in the same template.
- Values present in the body are stored; values_source='manual' if any value is set,
  else 'lims_auto' (the node will rely on LIMS fallback at GET time).

delete.description: Remove a node. ON DELETE CASCADE on parent_op_id removes the entire subtree.

patch.description:
Update a node. Setting any value to non-null switches values_source to 'manual'.
Setting all four values to null resets values_source to 'lims_auto'.

delete.description: Delete all flowsheets for this project.

post.description: Topologie procédé (v1) + annotations issues du DC, bilan massique, MER, paramètres simulation (PSD).
Create a flowsheet by parsing project.process_options string.

Analyze a single funding scenario for the project.

Returns debt schedule, DSCR, IRR comparison (project vs equity), and payback.

Compare multiple funding scenarios side by side.

Default: 100% equity, 70/30, 60/40, 50/50.

get.description: Aggregate all ABA/NAG results, compute PAG%, upsert ard_classifications.
Return the currently active basis for the project, or 404.

post.description: Create a draft basis (status='draft'). Activation is a separate call.
Live-preview the consequence class + derived criteria. No DB write.
Activate a draft basis; supersede any currently-active basis. Owner-only.

get.description: Export the Design Basis Memorandum as PDF (xhtml2pdf).

post.description: Sign an owner-only override on a violation (GISTM Principle 6 deviation).

get.description: Indicateur 0–100 basé sur la densité de données utiles au calage : flux bilan, paramètres sim, MER (volumétrie + tags kW), runs récents, chaîne d’essais LIMS MIN-01a + BWi (`lims_a1` + `lims_b1`). Moyenne pondérée ; détail dans `weights` et `components`.

Score 0–100 et gates pondérées : gabarit actif, critères DC, sections bilan massique v2, MER, paramètres simulation, LIMS (volume + part des échantillons créés sous 90 j), flowsheet. Les gates utilisent un crédit partiel (fraction 0–1) ; `ok` vaut true si fraction ≥ 0,95.

post.description: Auto-arrange equipment using a zone-based grid layout.

get.description: List LIMS alerts. (Mixed ORM approach for quick migration)

post.description: Create LIMS samples from distinct rock_types in the block model.

get.description:
Fit kinetic parameters (k, R∞) from D1 leach kinetics data.

Returns fitted curve parameters for the CIL kinetic model:
  R(t) = R∞ × (1 − exp(−k × t))

Detect statistical outliers in LIMS test data for a given field.

Returns flagged samples with their test statistic and threshold.

Run outlier detection across all supported test types and fields.
Returns a summary of flagged values per test type.

schema.title: Response Outlier Summary Api V1 Projects  Pid  Lims Outliers Summary Get

delete.description:
Delete ALL samples for a project. Cascade FKs in lims_a1/a2/a3/m1/b1/c2/.../detox
will wipe their test data automatically.

post.description:
Bulk insert — single transaction + single pipeline cascade signal.
Validates each row individually so a single bad row doesn't fail the
whole batch with a 422; bad rows come back in `rejected` instead.
~30× faster than POSTing one at a time.

get.description:
Statistical analysis of LIMS test data.

Returns descriptive statistics and outlier detection for each numeric field.

Query params:
  - method: "zscore", "modified_zscore" (default), "iqr", or "grubbs"
  - threshold: Outlier detection threshold (default 3.5 for modified Z-score)
  - alpha: Significance level for Grubbs (default 0.05 when method=grubbs,
           ignored otherwise)

delete.description: Delete ALL tests of a given type for a project.

post.description:
Bulk insert LIMS test results — one transaction, single cascade signal.
Skips per-row validation (callers should pre-validate); duplicates allowed.
Resolves `sample_id_display` to UUID if `sample_id` is not a valid UUID.

get.description: Return all sections and streams, grouped by section, with summary.

Delete existing MB data and regenerate from the selected circuit template.

Uses ``template_id`` when the UI has an explicit circuit selected. Otherwise

generate_mass_balance() from the engine, and returns the summary.

Save current MB as a named snapshot.

Reads all sections+streams, serializes to JSON, inserts into

Return all simulation_node_outputs for the run, indexed by operation_id.

post.description:
Upsert calculated metrics for nodes of a given run.

Engine convention (see plan pre-flight):
  - Per-node metrics (recovery_pct, power_kw, p80_um, …) are written under
    the actual operation_id of that node.
  - Plant-level metrics (npv_musd, aisc_per_oz, energy_kwh_t) are written
    under the operation_id of the BULLION leaf node (the terminal node
    whose product_kind='bullion'). The frontend resolves that id at
    render time by traversing the tree.

get.description: Génère des scénarios basés sur les modules précédents (LIMS, Design).
